project_goal: Build reproducible Isaac Sim physics experiments with reports, durable agent continuity, and future VR integration.
current_focus: Preserve project continuity across new agents
Keep instructions and architecture under git version control

expt1_angular_momentum.purpose: Angular momentum conservation with teammate-authored model integration
expt1_angular_momentum.key_pattern: visual USD plus hidden proxy physics bodies

expt7_momentum.key_pattern: standardized experiment class plus user-friendly launcher

operating_rules: Do not depend on prior chat as the only project memory
Record architecture or workflow decisions as ADRs
Write a handoff note when continuity would otherwise be lost
Update this file when project direction or active priorities change
Keep rule files and AGENTS.md versioned in git
open_risks: Continuity will decay if future sessions stop updating handoff and state files
Experiment runtime behavior still needs ongoing live Isaac Sim verification
next_actions: Use docs/START_HERE.md as the first file for future sessions
Add new experiment notes to docs/experiments before major implementation
Commit instruction and state changes together with related code changes
